channel.title: Guojin Chen
channel.description: Guojin Chen is a researcher working on foundation models for agentic systems, post-training, evaluation, and AI systems for software engineering.

item.title: Research Blogging Spike
item.description: A test article proving that this homepage can render math, citations, and code.

item.title: Why This Site
item.description: A short note on separating academic credibility from a broader personal surface.
